# Genomic Marker Database

Comprehensive list of markers mapped to category sub-skills for genetic analysis.

## Marker Categories Mapping

### Ancestry
- Mitochondrial haplogroups (via rs904 and others)
- Y-chromosome haplogroups
- Neanderthal admixture markers (rs1859951, rs1988499, rs1294558, rs1861685, rs4659768, rs688146)
- Population-specific variants

### Pharmacology (85+ drugs analyzed)

**Major Drug Metabolism Genes (Cytochrome P450)**:
- CYP1A2 (caffeine metabolism, paracetamol)
- CYP2B6 (efavirenz, methadone)
- CYP2C9 (warfarin, NSAIDs, phenytoin)
- CYP2C19 (clopidogrel, proton pump inhibitors, antidepressants)
- CYP2D6 (opioids, antipsychotics, antidepressants, tamoxifen)
- CYP3A4/5 (many drugs)

**Other Pharmacogenetic Markers**:
- VKORC1 (warfarin sensitivity/dosing)
- DPYD (fluorouracil, capecitabine toxicity)
- SLCO1B1 (statin tolerance)
- TPMT (thiopurine metabolism - azathioprine, mercaptopurine)
- ABCB1/P-glycoprotein (drug transport)
- G6PD (antimalarials, sulfonamides risk)
- CYP2C9*2, *3 (reduced enzyme activity)
- CYP2C19*2, *3, *17 (various activity levels)
- CYP2D6*3, *4, *5, *6, *N (gene deletions/conversions)

**Common Drugs Analyzed**:
- Abacavir (HIV) - adverse effects
- Amitriptyline, nortriptyline (antidepressants) - dosage
- Aspirin, ibuprofen, diclofenac (NSAIDs)
- Atorvastatin, simvastatin, rosuvastatin, pravastatin, fluvastatin, pitavastatin, lovastatin - dosage/myositis risk
- Caffeine (anxiety, sports performance)
- Carbamazepine, phenytoin (anticonvulsants) - dosage
- Citalopram, escitalopram, sertraline, paroxetine, fluvoxamine (SSRIs)
- Clopidogrel (antiplatelet) - dosage
- Codeine, tramadol, hydrocodone, fentanyl (opioids) - dosage
- Diazepam (benzodiazepine) - adverse effects
- Haloperidol, risperidone, quetiapine, olanzapine, aripiprazole (antipsychotics) - dosage
- Metformin (diabetes)
- Omeprazole, lansoprazole, pantoprazole (PPIs) - dosage
- Tamoxifen (breast cancer) - efficacy
- Tacrolimus (immunosuppressant) - dosage
- Valproic acid (anticonvulsant/mood stabilizer) - adverse effects
- Warfarin (anticoagulant) - adverse reactions, dosage
- Statins (multiple) - dosage and myopathy risk

### Wellness

**Nutrient Metabolism**:
- MTHFR, MTRR, MTR (folate/methylation)
- VDR (vitamin D receptor)
- HFE (iron metabolism)
- FUT2 (B12 absorption)
- TCN2 (B12 transport)
- SLC23A1, SLC23A2 (vitamin C)
- CYP2R1, GC (vitamin D)

**Lipid Metabolism**:
- APOA1, APOB (apolipoproteins)
- LDLR, PCSK9 (LDL cholesterol)
- LPA (lipoprotein(a))
- ABCG5/8 (plant sterol absorption)
- CETP, LIPG (HDL metabolism)

**Inflammatory Markers**:
- IL6, IL10, TNF (cytokines)
- CRP (C-reactive protein)
- SOD2 (antioxidant defense)

**Food Response**:
- LCT/MCM6 (lactose intolerance)
- HLA-DQ2.5, HLA-DQ8 (celiac disease)
- TAS2R38 (bitter taste perception)
- FTO (sweet preference, food intake control)
- MC4R (appetite regulation)

**Physical Traits**:
- ACTN3, ACE (muscle performance)
- AMPD1 (exercise-induced muscle damage)
- PPARGC1A, PDK4 (endurance)
- MSTN (muscle composition)
- COL1A1, BMP2 (bone mineral density)

### Hereditary (Monogenic Conditions)

**Cystic Fibrosis** - CFTR gene
- deltaF508, G551D, and 1900+ other variants
- Autosomal recessive inheritance

**Hereditary Hemochromatosis** - HFE gene
- C282Y, H63D, S65C variants

**Lynch Syndrome** - MLH1, MSH2, MSH6, PMS2, EPCAM

**Hereditary Breast/Ovarian Cancer** - BRCA1, BRCA2

**Cardiac Conditions**:
- Long QT syndrome (KCNQ1, KCNH2, SCN5A)
- Familial hypercholesterolemia (LDLR, APOB, PCSK9)

**Other Monogenic Conditions**:
- Alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency (SERPINA1)
- Gaucher disease (GBA)
- G6PD deficiency
- HHT (ACVRL1, ENG)
- Marfan syndrome (FBN1)
- PKU (PAH)
- Sickle cell disease (HBB)
- Wilson disease (ATP7B)
- Hemophilia A/B (F8, F9)
- Duchenne/Becker muscular dystrophy (DMD)
- Spinal muscular atrophy (SMN1)

### Personality/Cognition

**Neurotransmitter System**:
- COMT Val158Met (rs4680) - dopamine metabolism
- BDNF Val66Met (rs6265) - neuroplasticity
- SLC6A4 5-HTTLPR (rs4795541) - serotonin transporter
- HTR2A (rs6313) - serotonin receptor
- DRD2/DRD4 - dopamine receptors
- MAOA - monoamine oxidase
- DBH - dopamine beta-hydroxylase
- MAOB - monoamine oxidase B

**Stress Response**:
- FKBP5 (rs1360780) - glucocorticoid receptor co-chaperone
- NR3C1 (rs41423247) - glucocorticoid receptor
- CRHR1, CRHR2 - corticotropin releasing hormone receptors
- CRHR1 (rs110402)
- CRHR2 (rs2270007)

**Cognitive Function**:
- KIBRA/TYW5 (rs7017001) - memory
- GABRA2 (rs279989) - GABA receptor
- TCF7L2 (rs7903146) - diabetes/cognition link
- SNAP25 (rs1051312) - synaptic function
- NRG1 - neuregulin (schizophrenia risk)
- DTNBP1 - dysbindin (schizophrenia risk)

### Performance

**Muscle Composition & Strength**:
- ACTN3 R577X (rs1815739) - fast-twitch fiber preference
- ACE I/D (rs4340) - endurance/power balance
- MSTN K153R (rs1805086) - myostatin (muscle growth)
- PPARGC1A Gly482 (rs8192678) - mitochondrial biogenesis
- PKM2 (rs3762240) - muscle energy metabolism

**Cardiovascular & Endurance**:
- AMPD1 Q12X (rs17602729) - exercise endurance
- ADRB2 Gly16/Arg27 (rs1042713, rs1801252) - bronchodilation, lipolysis
- HIF1A (rs11549465) - hypoxia response

**Bone & Joint Health**:
- VDR (rs1544410, rs2228570) - vitamin D receptor, bone density
- COL1A1 (rs1800012) - collagen type I
- BMP2 (rs17563) - bone morphogenetic protein
- LRP5 (rs3736228) - Wnt signaling, bone mass

**Recovery & Sleep**:
- CLOCK T3111C (rs1801260) - circadian rhythm
- PER2 (rs2304672) - circadian rhythm
- CRY1 (rs2287161) - circadian regulation
- ARNTL (rs2277743) - clock gene
- FABP7 (rs514345) - astrocyte function, sleep quality
- ADORA2A (rs2298383) - adenosine receptor, caffeine sensitivity

### Genetic Vulnerability (Complex Polygenic Diseases)

**Cardiovascular Conditions** (100+ conditions analyzed):
- Coronary heart disease
- Myocardial infarction
- Heart failure
- Atrial fibrillation
- Arterial hypertension
- Peripheral arterial disease
- Venous thromboembolism/deep vein thrombosis
- Stroke (ischemic)
- Intracranial aneurysm
- Abdominal aortic aneurysm

**Neurological/Mental Health**:
- Alzheimer's disease (38 loci analyzed: ABCA7, ACE, ADAM10, ADAMTS1, APH1B, APOC1, APOC4, APOE, B4GALT3, BIN1, CASS4, CCDC6, CD2AP, CD33, CLNK, CLU, CR1, ECHDC3, EPHA1, EXOC3L2, FERMT2, INPP5D, KAT8, MS4A6E, NECTIN2, OARD1, PICALM, PILRA, PTK2B, SCIMP, SLC24A4, SORL1, SPI1, SPRED2, TRPM7, TSPAN14)
- Parkinson's disease
- Multiple sclerosis
- Schizophrenia
- Bipolar disorder
- Depression
- Anxiety
- Migraines/Headaches
- Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS)

**Metabolic/Endocrine**:
- Type 1 diabetes
- Type 2 diabetes
- Obesity (BMI, body fat percentage)
- Hypercholesterolemia
- Hyperlipidemia
- Gout
- Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease

**Autoimmune/Inflammatory**:
- Rheumatoid arthritis
- Psoriasis
- Crohn's disease
- Ulcerative colitis
- Systemic lupus erythematosus
- Hashimoto's thyroiditis
- Graves' disease
- Multiple sclerosis

**Cancer Predisposition**:
- Prostate cancer
- Breast cancer (BRCA1/2 related)
- Colorectal cancer
- Lung cancer
- Pancreatic cancer
- Melanoma (cutaneous malignant)
- Basal cell carcinoma
- Glioma/Glioblastoma
- Endometrial cancer
- Testicular germ cell cancer

**Other Complex Conditions**:
- Osteoporosis
- Osteoarthritis (hip, knee, general)
- Cataracts
- Glaucoma (open-angle)
- Age-related macular degeneration
- Hearing loss (age-related, sensorineural)
- Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD)
- Asthma
- Allergic rhinitis
- Atopic dermatitis
- Restless legs syndrome
- Narcolepsy

## Evidence Tier System

| Tier | Description | Actionability |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| **Strong** | Replicated GWAS, large effect size, meta-analyses | High confidence recommendations |
| **Moderate** | Multiple smaller studies, moderate effect | Consider with lifestyle factors |
| **Preliminary** | Early research, novel findings, candidate genes | Informational only |

## Key rsID Reference

### Methylation/B Vitamins
| rsID | Gene | Variant | Impact |
|------|------|---------|--------|
| rs1801133 | MTHFR | C677T | Reduced enzyme activity (~40%) |
| rs1801131 | MTHFR | A1298C | Reduced enzyme activity (~20%) |
| rs1801394 | MTRR | A66G | Affects B12 metabolism |
| rs1805087 | MTR | A2756G | Methionine synthase activity |
| rs234706 | CBS | C699T | Homocysteine metabolism |
